description: Italian foundation promoting digital health innovation and supporting public healthcare digitization. Works with NHS Italy (SSN) on e-prescription, EHR, and telemedicine infrastructure projects.
business_model: Non-profit - Public-private partnerships with Italian healthcare system
target_market: Italian regional healthcare systems (ASL), hospitals, public health
key_investors: Italian Ministry of Health, private healthcare partners
competitive_advantage: Government backing, standardization role, public sector access

varden_fit.rationale: Infrastructure player in Italian public health - potential partner for public sector contracts
